name_cn:
💰Black·
24ss Autumn/Winter Limited Briefcase
A unique fusion of art and personality. Y's always has a unique vision, winning the hearts of top fashion icons. The Y-shaped cowhide design is eye-catching, giving a casual, lazy, yet distinctive feel. Suitable for both men and women. Can be used as a briefcase or travel tote. Extra-large capacity.
Model: 817603
Size: 30×33×10cm
